devnotes.summary: UMod is a unit that defines the base classes TMod and TSubmodel. TMod can be instantiated directly and is the central control object of a simulation model. It summarizes the submodels of the simulation model and provides methods for data output, parameter estimation, and sensitivity analysis. TSubModel is an abstract base class for problem specific submodels. Furthermore some other classes are defined.
enumeration type for model Elements
enumeration type strings for model Elements
enumeration type strings for model Elements
type for numbers of Model Elements in each submodel
type for numbers of Model Elements in each submodel
type for list of stringlists of Model Elements in each submodel
type for list of stringlists of Model Elements in each submodel
Creates new TMemIniFile instance with initially specified FileName, Encoding and CaseSensitive property values. Which will be used to load the file content.
Returns True if the content was modified after loading the file or after last UpdateFile call. Property may be set manually to control automatic file saving when AutoSave is True.

When value is True, then content will be automatically saved in specified file at destruction, if content was modified. When value is False, then content will be not automatically saved. To save the content use UpdateFile method.
enumeration type for shape of submodel in diagram
Options for weighting of data points during optimization
Options for parameter Optimization

Options for continous output, NoContOuput: No Outputfile is written, even if Option ContOutput of submodel is true, AllContOutput: Outputfile is written, even if Option ContOuput of submodel is false SubmodelSpecific: Outputfile is written, according to Option ContOutpus of submodel
string constants for Model element names
Path separator for Windows
file names used by TMod
Options for the Marquard-Method used for parameter estimation it is descended either from Tobject if compiled for command line application or from TPersistent if compiled for GUI appplication

devnotes.PublicField: Value which is needed for numerical approximation of function derivative
Options for weighting of data points during optimization
Default error for weighting of data points

devnotes.summary: Initial value of parameter Lambda
Value which is needed for numerical approximation of function derivative
Options for weighting of data points during optimization
Default error for weighting of data points
Options for parameter Optimization

file variables and names for output of sensitivity analysis

minimum value during sensitivity analysis
Steps of sensitivity analysis
change of parameter per sensitivy setpp
Output file for endvalues of variables selected for output
output file name for sensitivity data
Sets maximum value during sensitivity analysis
Sets minimum value during sensitivity analysis
Sets number of steps of sensitivity analysis

field.name: SelSenspar
field.devnotes: Sets number of steps of sensitivity analysis Parameter selected for sensitivity analysis

devnotes.summary: Output variables selected for sensitivity analysis
Create an TSensitivityOptions instance to save options for Sensitivity analysis used within the TMod class
Maximum value during sensitivity analysis
Minimum value during sensitivity analysis

change of parameter per sensitivy stet
Variables selected for output
file variables and names for output of sensitivity analysis

class.name: TMod
class.devnotes:
abstract base type for a model component, forward declaration Base type for the central model component It summarizes the submodels of the simulation model and provides methods for data output, parameter estimation, and sensitivity analysis. It is descended either from Tobject if compiled for command line application or from TPersistent if compiled for GUI appplication.
abstract base type for the main model control component all submodels have to be connected to this component via their property gm_submodel property.

devnotes.PrivateField: directory where program file is located

field.name: FApplicationPath
field.devnotes: directory where program file is located directory where program file is located directory where program file is located

field.name: FTitle
field.devnotes: directory where program file is located field for adress of status bar on main model formula Model name

field.name: fStatusBar
field.devnotes: Modeltitle status bar in Main Formular Simulation info

field.name: fStatusBarOpt
field.devnotes: status bar in Main Formular Simulation info

field.name: fControlFileFn
field.devnotes: status bar in Formular for optimization Name of controlfile

devnotes.PrivateField: Name of file where regression results are stored

field.name: fDocu_FN
field.devnotes: Name of file where regression results are stored Name of file where Model documentation is stored

field.name: fDocu_FN2
field.devnotes: Name of file where Model documentation is stored

field.name: fFNGlobalOutput
field.devnotes: Name of file where Model documentation 2 is stored Name of global output file

field.name: FOutputPath
field.devnotes:
file name for global Output
Default directory for output

field.name: fReadIniOutputPath
field.devnotes: default directory for output flag for reading output path from Ini-file

field.name: FInputPath
field.devnotes: flag for Default directory for input

field.name: FStartTime
field.devnotes: Time step for model integration Start of simulation

field.name: FEndTime
field.devnotes: Start of simulation End of simulation

field.name: FSensOptions
field.devnotes: End of simulation Options for optimization

field.name: FMinLegalValue
field.devnotes: Options for sensitivity analysis smallest measured value accepted in Optimization

field.name: fReInitAfterRun
field.devnotes: smallest measured value accepted in Optimization flag if model should be reinitalised after run: defaul: true

field.name: fShowDateFormat
field.devnotes: flag if model should be reinitalised after run: defaul: true flag for showing time in date format

field.name: fWriteResIni
field.devnotes: flag for showing time in date format flag for writing res.ini files for documentation

field.name: fChiSqr
field.devnotes: flag for writing res.ini files for documentation. flag for writing res.ini files for documentation

field.name: fContOutput
field.devnotes: field for total sum of squared differences (sim-meas) option for continous output, type is TContOutput which defines the options NoContOutput, SubmodelSpecific and AllContoutput

field.name: fOptContOutput
field.devnotes: option for

field.name: FStr_SectionName_TimeInit
field.devnotes: Toggle choice for file output every time step

devnotes.summary: getter for submodel

Base class of all sub-models. Provides methods for initialisation, input, output and integration. Acestor is TObject if compiled for command line application or from TGraphicControl if compiled for GUI application
Abstract base class for a model component

Sets end time of simulation
Set time step for model integration
Write names and units of all sensitivity steps to output file (_dat.csv)
Write names and units of all variables to output file (_dat.csv)

Method for sorting the submodels in the list of submodels according to their value of thier property CompIndex

Method for initialising the state ini file
Method for initialising the parameter ini file
Method for initialising the options ini file
Method for calculation and savin linear regressions between measured and simulated values
Method for checking if the submodel is set for continuous output
Method for reading or creating the ini files
Method for initialisation of the weather data file
Method for updating the status bar on the GUI at every timestep

procedure.devnotes: Method for showing object on the screen

procedure.name: Notification
procedure.devnotes: ensures that if a submodel is removed from the model it is also removed from the SubModStrList

field.name: FLMOptions
field.devnotes: write parameters and filenames of simulation run to result file

field.devnotes: Pointer for GUI-properties saving file List of Inifiles

field.devnotes: File variable of results of regression analysis

devnotes.summary: The time state variable

field.devnotes: model time List of sub-models

field.name: ModelEnd
field.devnotes: List of sub-models flag for end of simulation

field.name: ActIniFile
field.devnotes: End of simulation ? the actual ini-file

field.name: ParamInifile
field.devnotes: TMyIniFile; // actual Ini-File Ini-file with parameter values

field.name: StateIniFile
field.devnotes: Ini-file with parameter values Ini-file with state variable initial values

field.name: OptionIniFile
field.devnotes: Ini-file with state variable initial values Ini-file with options for submodels

field.name: WeatherFile
field.devnotes: Ini-file with options for submodels TXT-file with weather data

field.name: f_GlobalOutput
field.devnotes: Weather data Output file stream for global output

field.name: AllMeasVal
field.devnotes: output stream/file for output of selected vars Output file stream for global output

field.name: SelMeasVal
field.devnotes: list of all measurement values List of measured values

field.name: SelParList
field.devnotes: list of measurement values selected for optimization List of all parameters to be optimized

field.name: GlobalOutputList
field.devnotes: address list of all parameters to be optimized List of output variables selected for global output

field.name: FirstWeatherData
field.devnotes: address list of all values for global output Time of first weather data in Excel-Time integers

devnotes.summary: Time of last weather data in Excel-Time integers
Calls inherited create and initializes properties, lists and files
Sets name of control Ini file (published for use in object inspector) and reads or creates Ini files
devnotes.remarks: If no control files are existing they will be created

devnotes.summary: Gets name of Control file (published for use in object inspector)
Set the plot and output properties from Ini file for entities in a stringlist of a submodel
Delivers values of parameter "ParName"
Delivers values of state variable "StateName"
Delivers values of variable "VarName"
Run method INPUT OUTPUT COMMENT
Run method, runs the model over the list of ini files

procedure.name: runActIni
procedure.devnotes: CalcAllvar, CalcAllRates, UpdateAll, Integrate ... Run method for actual INI-file only INPUT OUTPUT COMMENT

devnotes.summary: Initialize state, parameter and weather files; init time settings; resort submodels
Call initialization methods of sub-models
For each submodel clear data pair series
Write names and units of all variables to output file (_dat.csv)
For each submodel do integration
For each submodel calculate rates

procedure.name: CalcAllVars
procedure.devnotes: call variable calculations of all sub-models

devnotes.summary: For each submodel do update using measured values
For each submodel do variable update, Rate calculation and
Call methods for calculation of variables of all active submodels
write final names of all sub-models to file
For each submodel add simulated values to corresponding measured data
For each submodel save states to output files
For all submodels write state values to final output file
For each submodel save rates to output files
Writes values of state, parameter and external variables to output files
For each submodel close state and rate output file (_dat.csv/_rat.csv)
For each submodel close final state output files
Output of simulated/measured data pairs to _1_1.csv files for all submodells
For all submodels calculate linear regression statistics
For each submodel initialize external variables (setting their pointers)
Sets TMod.ModelEnd to true if time counter passed endtime of model
Calculation of sum of squared differences INPUT OUTPUT COMMENT
For each submodel clear data pair series
Optimization routine

procedure.name: CalcSensitivity
procedure.devnotes: CalcAllvar, CalcAllRates, UpdateAll, Integrate ... implementation of a Sensitivity analysis the procedure produces two types of output, a endpoint value for the choosen mode entities and a time series output

procedure.name: CalcSensitivityMultRun
procedure.devnotes: Sensitivity analysis for single simulation run

procedure.name: CalcChiSquareSensitivity
procedure.devnotes: Sensititvity of ChiSquare Values over 1 to several simulation runs

devnotes.summary: Sets TMod.ModelEnd to true if time counter passed endtime of model

property.name: SubModel[Index]
property.devnotes: Array property for convenient Access of Submodels, allows to access submodels by their index index is the index of the submodel in the list of submodels, starting with 0 e.g. SubModel[0] returns the first submodel in the list of submodels SubModel[1] returns the second submodel in the list of submodels, etc. useful for accessing submodels in a loop

devnotes.summary: property for the control file name
Shows Message after doubleclick on TMod during Run-time
Method for showing object on the screen

property.name: Str_SectionName_TimeInit
property.devnotes: smallest measurement value accepted in optimization

devnotes.summary: Base class of all sub-models. Provides methods for initialisation, input, output and integration. Acestor is TObject if compiled for command line application or from TGraphicControl if compiled for GUI application
Abstract base class for a model component

field.name: FCompIndex
field.devnotes: Index of computation order

field.name: fAssimilatedSubmodList
field.devnotes: List of assimilated submodels

field.name: fUpdateValueList
field.devnotes: List of update values

field.name: fModelElementLists
field.devnotes: List of Model Elements, i.e. State, Vars, Params, Externals, Consts

field.name: fDebugmodus
field.devnotes: flag for enabling debugging mode

field.name: fOptContOutput
field.devnotes: Option for writing output each time step

field.name: fWritecontinuouslyToFile
field.devnotes: Should output be written to file continously

field.name: fOptFinalOutput
field.devnotes: Option for writing final values output at end of simulation

field.name: fWriteFinallyToFile
field.devnotes: Should output be written to file finally

field.name: fDebugForm
field.devnotes: Pointer to abstract Form for debugging

devnotes.summary: Registers parameter (TPar instance) in parameter list of submodel
Registers Option (TOption instance) in option list of submodel
Registers variable (TVar instance) in variable list of submodel
Registers state variable (TState instance) in state variable list of submodel
Registers variable (TVar instance) in variable list of submodel
Adds submodel to TMod's Submodel-String-List
Clears data pair series
TState is a class representing a state variable in the model, which has an initial value and a rate of change.
devnotes.remarks: Extends TVar and provides a constructor for creating state variables with initial value, change rate, and comment.

devnotes.summary: TPar is a class representing a parameter variable in the model, which can be selected for optimization or sensitivity analysis.
devnotes.remarks: Extends TVar and adds properties for maximum and minimum expected values, error, and selection flags.

devnotes.summary: TVar is a class representing a variable, i.e. a value that can be calculated for each time step in the model from other variables, state variables or parameters.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for automatic source code generation for initialization and rate calculation.

devnotes.summary: TVar is a class representing a variable, i.e. a value that can be calculated for each time step in the model from other variables, state variables or parameters.
devnotes.remarks: Extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for automatic source code generation for initialization and rate calculation.

devnotes.summary: TOption is a class representing an option with a string value and a list of possible options.
TExternV is a class representing an external variable in the model. Values of model elements outside a submodel are called "external variables" and can be accessed via pointers.
devnotes.remarks: The default method for setting the link to the external variable is to search for it in the model by its name. Extends THumeNumEntity and provides methods for getting and setting the value, as well as creating the external variable with a name, units, and an external value type.

devnotes.summary: Delivers reference to "global" model (TMod instance9 where submodel is registered

retval.devnotes:
abstract base type for a model component, forward declaration Base type for the central model component It summarizes the submodels of the simulation model and provides methods for data output, parameter estimation, and sensitivity analysis. It is descended either from Tobject if compiled for command line application or from TPersistent if compiled for GUI appplication.
abstract base type for the main model control component all submodels have to be connected to this component via their property gm_submodel property.

devnotes.summary: Initiates submodel according to "global" model (TMod instance)
New Paint procedure for TSubmodel (which is derived from TGraphicControl)

field.name: submodname
field.devnotes: Name of instance

field.name: GlobMod
field.devnotes: Instance of class Tmod to which sub-model is linked

field.name: StateStrList
field.devnotes: List of state variables

field.name: ParStrList
field.devnotes: List of parameters

field.name: VarStrList
field.devnotes: List of variables

field.name: ConstStrList
field.devnotes: List of constants

field.name: OptionStrList
field.devnotes: List of Options (saved as strings)

field.name: ExternVStrList
field.devnotes: List of external values

field.name: ParIniF
field.devnotes: Ini-file with parameters

field.name: StateIniF
field.devnotes: Ini-file with initial values of state variables

field.name: OptionIniF
field.devnotes: Ini-file with options

field.name: f_state
field.devnotes: File variable for state output, now implemented as TStreamWriter

field.name: ffin_state
field.devnotes: File variable for final state output, now implemented as TStreamWriter

field.name: f_rate
field.devnotes: File variable for rate output, now implemented as TStreamWriter

field.name: fn_state
field.devnotes: File name for state output

field.name: fn_finalstate
field.devnotes: File name for final output of states

field.name: fn_rate
field.devnotes: File name for rate output

field.name: FMeasValues
field.devnotes: file with measured data

field.name: FMeasValues_2
field.devnotes: second file with measured data, meant for input with different time resolution

field.name: FUpdValues
field.devnotes: file with measured data for updating

field.name: SomethingMeasured
field.devnotes: true if measurement data is available

field.name: DoUpdate
field.devnotes: true if data for updating is available

field.name: NextUpdate
field.devnotes: Time of next Update

field.name: DataList
field.devnotes: List of measured data series

field.name: IsActive
field.devnotes: Check for inactivation

field.name: ShowWarnings
field.devnotes: Should output be written to file finally

field.name: GlobTime
field.devnotes: show warnings during simulation

setting pointers of external variables Method for creating all entities of the submodel

devnotes.summary: Initialisation method for TSubmodel
Rate calculation (to be overwritten by derived classes)

procedure.devnotes: rate calculation Method for integrating the submodel

devnotes.summary: Variable calculation (to be overwritten by derived classes)
update Values by measured data

Write names and units of all variables to final output file (_dat.csv)
Write names and units of all rate variables to output file (_dat.csv)
Writes values of state, parameter and external variables to output files
Writes values of rate variables to output files
Writes values of state, parameter and external variables to output files
Method for closing all output files of the submodel
Set isActive flag
Set the Isactive flag to false
Method for adding measured values to data serie
Adding simulated values to corresponding measured data
Output of simulated/measured data pairs to _1_1.csv files
Calculation of linear regression

property.name: StateVar[index]
property.devnotes: calculation of linear regression property to access state vars via index

property.name: ParamVar[index]
property.devnotes: List of state variables property to access parameters via index

devnotes.summary: property to access variables via index
property to access constants via index
property to access options via index
property to access external variables via index
Show Message after doubleclick on TSubmodel during Runtime
property to linkt the submodel to the main model component
property to access the stringlist with external variables of the submodel
property to access the stringlist with variables of the submodel
property to access the stringlist with constants of the submodel
property to access the stringlist with parameters of the submodel
property to access the stringlist with state variables of the submodel
property to access the compindex field of the submodel. This field controls the execution order of the submodels
property to access the file name of the submodel rate output file
property to access the file name of the submodel state output file
property to access the file name of the measruement data for the submodel
property to access the stringlist with assimilated sub models, i.e. submodels which are linked to the submodel but not to the central model, this feature is not yet worked out
property access the debug modus field of the sub model
property to access the flag for writing output continously
Exchanges data with TModelEdit form and starts designtime editing
Registering the TMod and TSubModel components for designtime editing
